name: 07_Image_Super_Resolution_SRCNN_Set5_DL
query: Habari, nahitaji kuunda mradi wa kuongeza azimio la picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRCNN na seti ya data ya Set5 (inapatikana kutoka `https://huggingface.co/datasets/eugenesiow/Set5`). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Wakati wa kupakia data, jumuisha hatua za usindikaji wa awali wa picha kama vile kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa SRCNN unapaswa kupakiwa na kutumika katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi seti 5 za picha za kulinganisha, ukizoom kwenye maelezo, kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`, na matokeo ya kuongeza azimio kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`. Picha zilizozalishwa zinapaswa kuwa za ubora wa juu na kuonyesha wazi maboresho.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.
Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mradi unapaswa kuzalisha picha za kuongeza azimio za ubora wa juu, zilizo wazi na zenye kulinganisha kwa kina.
Picha za matokeo zilizopangwa vizuri, zikionyesha maboresho muhimu, zinapaswa kujumuishwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/data_loader.py` does not explicitly show the loading of the "Set5" dataset from "Hugging Face". The function `load_dataset()` is a placeholder and only returns a dictionary indicating a dataset is "loaded" without any actual implementation of loading the "Set5" dataset. There is no evidence in the provided code that confirms the dataset is being loaded from "Hugging Face".

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement specifies that image preprocessing, including resizing and normalization, should be performed in `src/data_loader.py`. While the file does contain a placeholder function `build_transforms()` that mentions "normalization" and "scaling", the implementation is minimal and lacks concrete evidence of actual resizing and normalization processes being executed. Additionally, trajectory evidence indicates warnings about resizing and normalization issues, suggesting incomplete or incorrect implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>: The requirement specifies that the "SRCNN" model should be used in `src/model.py`. However, the content of the file provided does not show any implementation or import of the "SRCNN" model. Instead, it contains a placeholder function `build_model()` that returns a string "model placeholder" and checks for "resnet-18" in keywords, which is unrelated to SRCNN. There is no evidence of SRCNN being implemented or utilized in the provided code snippet.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement that five sets of comparison images are stored and super-resolved as `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png` is not satisfied. The content of the file `super_resolution_compare.png` indicates an error related to an unsupported image format, which suggests that the image file is not valid or properly stored. This contradicts the trajectory evidence that suggests the file was saved successfully, indicating a discrepancy that needs resolution.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement that the results of the super-resolution process are stored as `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png` is not satisfied. The content of the file indicates an error related to an unsupported image format, as evidenced by the error message: "You uploaded an unsupported image. Please make sure your image is valid." This suggests that the image file is not correctly stored or is corrupted, preventing it from being a valid output of the super-resolution process.
